title: helichrysum lineare
intro: Helichrysum lineare, also known as annual strawflower, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family, characterized by its yellow or white daisy-like flowers and linear leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Helichrysum lineare include its ability to improve circulation, reduce anxiety and stress, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum lineare include teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to promote overall well-being.
